# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Design system / UI polish
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Workflow module
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Deployment / ops

## Areas touched

- [ ] App routes
- [ ] App shell / navigation
- [ ] Atlas components
- [ ] CSS layers
- [ ] API route
- [ ] Lib/domain types
- [ ] Local stores/persistence
- [ ] Docs

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] Manual QA completed

## Manual QA routes

- [ ] `/`
- [ ] `/actions`
- [ ] `/admin`
- [ ] `/admin/agsa-review`
- [ ] `/sources`
- [ ] `/search`
- [ ] `/intervention-queue`
- [ ] `/municheck`

## Device checks

- [ ] Laptop desktop
- [ ] Large desktop
- [ ] Phone mobile
- [ ] Phone Desktop site mode

## Public-safety check

- [ ] No unsupported public claims added
- [ ] Source/review/confidence state preserved where relevant
- [ ] Internal workflow notes are not exposed publicly

## Documentation updated

- [ ] `docs/README.md`
- [ ] `docs/API_REFERENCE.md`
- [ ] `docs/WORKFLOW_MODULES.md`
- [ ] `docs/CSS_LAYERS.md`
- [ ] `docs/NEXT_STEPS.md`
- [ ] Not applicable

## Notes for reviewer

Add anything the reviewer should pay special attention to.
